entities.name: Barthan
entities.raw_quote: I call upon you, O airy powers of the East, Barthan, Formione, Iammax

entities.name: Formione
entities.raw_quote: I call upon you, O airy powers of the East, Barthan, Formione, Iammax

entities.name: Iammax
entities.raw_quote: I call upon you, O airy powers of the East, Barthan, Formione, Iammax

entities.name: Zabuater
entities.raw_quote: invoking I conjure you through Zabuater, Rabarmas, Hiskiros

entities.name: Rabarmas
entities.raw_quote: invoking I conjure you through Zabuater, Rabarmas, Hiskiros

entities.name: Hiskiros
entities.raw_quote: invoking I conjure you through Zabuater, Rabarmas, Hiskiros

entities.name: Raphael
entities.raw_quote: names of your holy angels: Raphael, Caphael, Dardiel, Hurathaphel

entities.name: Caphael
entities.raw_quote: names of your holy angels: Raphael, Caphael, Dardiel, Hurathaphel

entities.name: Satquiel
entities.raw_quote: At the second sword: Satquiel, [Raphael], Paamcociel

entities.name: Samael
entities.raw_quote: at the third sword: ... Samael, Satiel, Ituraiel

entities.name: Gabriel
entities.raw_quote: at the fifth sword: ... Gabriel, Mychael, Samyel

entities.name: Belzebub
entities.raw_quote: per capud principis vestri Belzebub, cui debetis obedire

entities.name: Tetragramaton
entities.raw_quote: through this ineffable name 'Tetragrammaton:' IOHT, HE, VAU, DALETH

entities.name: Geneolia
entities.raw_quote: Geneolia, Chide, ministers of the Tartarean seat of Primachia

entities.name: Chide
entities.raw_quote: Geneolia, Chide, ministers of the Tartarean seat of Primachia

entities.name: Primachia
entities.raw_quote: ministers of the Tartarean seat of Primachia

entities.name: Occinnomos
entities.raw_quote: obey your master, who is called 'Occinnomos.'

entities.name: Labadau
entities.raw_quote: Princeps eorum est Labadau. Eius coadiutor est Asmodeus

entities.name: Asmodeus
entities.raw_quote: Eius coadiutor est Asmodeus, qui dat thesaurum indestructibilem

entities.name: Trocornifer
entities.raw_quote: Corniger rex meridionalis, et habet 4 ministros... Trocornifer in oriente

entities.name: Malafer
entities.raw_quote: Trocornifer in oriente, Malafer in occidente

entities.name: Euiraber
entities.raw_quote: Malafer in occidente, Euiraber in meridie

entities.name: Mulcifer
entities.raw_quote: Euiraber in meridie, Mulcifer in septemtrione

summary: This chunk details the conjuration of airy powers and angels using specific names for seven swords, followed by instructions to placate spirits through kneeling and signs. It concludes with Chapter CXXXV describing earth spirits (Labadau, Asmodeus) and their ministers in four directions.
key_passages: I call upon you, O airy powers of the East, Barthan, Formione, Iammax
per capud principis vestri Belzebub, cui debetis obedire
through this ineffable name 'Tetragrammaton:' IOHT, HE, VAU, DALETH
Geneolia, Chide, ministers of the Tartarean seat of Primachia
Princeps eorum est Labadau. Eius coadiutor est Asmodeus
